evals.prompt: Implement error handling for this API fetch function that calls GitHub API. Handle rate limiting, auth failures, and network errors appropriately.
evals.expected_output: Created structured error handling with AppError class, proper error codes for different failure modes (AUTH_INVALID_TOKEN, API_RATE_LIMITED, NETWORK_OFFLINE), user-safe error messages, and redacted logging that doesn't expose tokens.

evals.prompt: Add error boundaries to this React app to prevent white screen of death on component crashes
evals.expected_output: Implemented GlobalErrorBoundary and RouteErrorBoundary components with componentDidCatch, getDerivedStateFromError, fallback UI screens, and proper error logging with context.

evals.prompt: Create offline detection and graceful degradation for this PWA that syncs data to GitHub
evals.expected_output: Implemented OfflineMonitor class with online/offline event listeners, isOnline() method, subscribe() for reactive updates, and UI states that inform users of offline status with queued actions.
